/usr/bin/cc -fPIC     -O3 -DNDEBUG  -fno-stack-protector  -Xlinker -z -Xlinker now -fPIC -shared -lgcc -Wl,--hash-style=both -Xlinker -T -Xlinker "/home/kiwi/UIT-DoAn/NT521/AutoPwn/AutoPwn/nlp_engine/module2/build/heap_tracer.ldscript" -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/heap_tracer.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libheap_tracer.so -o libheap_tracer.so CMakeFiles/heap_tracer.dir/heap_tracer.c.o  /home/kiwi/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0-1/ext/lib64/release/libdrwrap.so /home/kiwi/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0-1/ext/lib64/release/libdrsyms.so /home/kiwi/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0-1/ext/lib64/release/libdrmgr.so /home/kiwi/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0-1/ext/lib64/release/libdrcontainers.a /home/kiwi/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0-1/lib64/release/libdynamorio.so
